description: The inventory system alerts that the stock of a critical part (touchscreen displays) will be depleted in 4 hours, potentially halting production.

nodes.task_description: Identify the part number and the supplier for the component.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the part and the supplier 'DisplayTech Inc'.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of any in-transit shipments of that part from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the next shipment is delayed and now scheduled for tomorrow.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to request an expedited, emergency shipment and search for alternative, certified suppliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the supplier to arrange an emergency air freight shipment.
